title: Hark! a voice from heav’n proclaiming
firstLine: Hark! a voice from heav’n proclaiming,
publicDomainBasis: Albert Benjamin Simpson (1843–1919), Albert Benjamin Simpson (1843–1919). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
Hark! a voice from heav’n proclaiming,
“It is done.”
Faith repeats the echo claiming,
“It is done.”

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Hear the bleeding Savior crying,
“It is done.”
Claim His finished work, replying,
“It is done.”

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Yield thyself in consecration,
“It is done.”
Take the Lord for full salvation,
“It is done.”

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Claim the promise of His healing,
“It is done.”
Trust without a sign or feeling,
“It is done.”

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Say of every promised blessing,
“It is done.”
Rest upon His word, confessing,
“It is done.”

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
This the secret of receiving,
“It is done.”
Take Him at His word believing,
“It is done.”
